name: Bulk Rename Tokens

description: Mass-rename a token across N files using a Python script written to /tmp via Bash heredoc. Avoids the zsh/bash escape pitfalls of inline Python heredocs. Use for feature ID renumbering, slug rename, version bump cascade.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver bulk rename tokens output correctly and completely.
